name: Steak-Vegetable Pockets
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the steak by removing any bones and slicing it thinly.
2. Slice the broccoli, carrot, green pepper, mushrooms, and pea pods as directed.
3. Chop the tomato into small pieces.
4. In a bowl, mix the sliced vegetables with oil until evenly coated.
5. Add the cornstarch to the mixture and stir until all ingredients are combined.
6. Stuff each halved pita bread round with an equal amount of the vegetable mixture, ensuring it fills most of the pocket.
7. Place the stuffed pitas on a baking sheet.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for about 15-20 minutes, or until heated through and lightly browned.
